extract: Scorched Slab (Japanese: 日照りの岩戸 Drought Cave) is a small cave found in Hoenn. It can be accessed by surfing in an indented lake on Route 120 near Fortree City. In Generation III, there is nothing here other than a single item, TM11 (Sunny Day). In Generation VI, Scorched Slab has four floors and several other items, as well as being home to Heatran.
